review: THATS MY JAM. This is my go to album. I luuuuv it so much. The whole concept of it is sooooooo good. I think this is one of the best albums of all time.
I love this album. It is one of the kind. Best american record. Everytime I feel in some weird way with my emotions, I play this album.

It was a long time since I stopped listening to the BTS. This album had so much potential bcs of the beats in the first part of the album. The beats in the first part are aggressive, strong. While the second part of album is more like pop, ballad, sad-pop. It had so much potential but it’s waisted. It feels rushed, which they later confirmed that the album was rushed.

The beginning. This album basically introduced me to Charli xcx and her world of music. I was listening to her before of course, but not in this way. After this album, I started listening to her music more frequently and exploring her work. Then I found scrapped album XCX World, searched lore behind it. I am hoping she will release XCX World to the public soon.

album: Sin Miedo (del Amor y Otros Demonios) ∞
review: UGHHHHHHH. When I played this album for the first time, I remember I was like: "OH WTH LADYYYY". This album is most streamed album on my last.fm. With a reason. Every time I would listen to this album, I would transcendence into another dimension. I love this album and I thank him for saving me in so many different occasions
I thought the whole album is going to be upbeat crank style, but it's not. I am so much disappointed and I had so much hope for this album, but it does not live to the hype which is sad.
